code:
mut i = 1
mut c3 = 1
mut c5 = 1
while i <= 15
  let f3 = c3 == 3
  let f5 = c5 == 3
end
mut n = 1
mut t3 = 1
mut t5 = 1
while n <= 15
  let is3 = t3 == 3
  let is5 = t5 == 5
  if is3 and is5
    println("FizzBuzz")
  else if is3
    println("Fizz")
  else if is5
    println("Buzz")
  else
    println("#{n}")
  end
  if is3
    t3 = 1
  else
    t3 = t3 + 1
  end
  if is5
    t5 = 1
  else
    t5 = t5 + 1
  end
  n = n + 1
end
